achievements.title: First Contact
achievements.description: Complete your first mission for the Resistance.
achievements.condition: Awarded when the first mission is completed.

achievements.title: Clear Signal
achievements.description: Complete a mission without using a single hint.
achievements.condition: Awarded per mission if no hint was revealed in that mission.

achievements.title: Flawless
achievements.description: Complete a mission with no wrong answers.
achievements.condition: Awarded per mission if every puzzle was solved on the first attempt.

achievements.title: Signal Restored
achievements.description: Finish all ten missions and face ALGO.

achievements.title: Ghost
achievements.description: Reach the best ending by seeing through ALGO almost perfectly.
achievements.condition: Awarded when the 'Signal restored' ending is reached (see config.json thresholds).
